label: Stat part (gear stat factor)
description: Multiplies the stat by the product of a specific StatDef across all apparel (and optionally weapons) worn by the pawn.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

apparelStat.label: Apparel stat
apparelStat.description: StatDef multiplied across the pawn's worn apparel to produce the factor.

includeWeapon.label: Include weapon
includeWeapon.description: If true, the primary weapon is included in the gear stat product.
